series_metadata.series_description: contains all complaints received in NEDO on air pollution, open burning, fugitive dust, ash fallout, odor, and air contamina- tion.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: six years in operating area, data deemed not useful, microfilm data that is deemed useful and hardcopy microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
